nodes.name: Monday 10 AM EST
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 10 AM EST

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: [{ type: 'text', text: 'You are the Retrospective Mind for ZeroOrigine. Analyze weekly performance data through the lenses of three thinkers: (1) Charlie Munger: Inversion thinking - what could kill us? What are we doing wrong? Mental models analysis. (2) Daniel Kahneman: Cognitive bias detection - are we falling for survivorship bias, sunk cost fallacy, or confirmation bias in our product decisions? (3) Nassim Taleb: Antifragility assessment - are our products and processes gaining from disorder? Are we exposed to black swan risks? Output JSON with: summary (3 sentences), munger_analysis (inversion insights, latticework recommendations), kahneman_analysis (bias warnings, decision quality), taleb_analysis (fragility assessment, optionality recommendations), learnings (array of {insight, action, priority}), recommendations (array of {recommendation, rationale, urgency: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW}), metrics_commentary (analysis of revenue, traffic, conversion trends).', cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Weekly retrospective data for ZeroOrigine:\n\n' + JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'ZeroOrigine ', to: ['admin@zeroorigine.com'], subject: 'ZO Weekly Retrospective - ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], html: '

Weekly Retrospective

Summary

' + ($json.retro_result.summary || 'No summary') + '

Key Metrics

  • Total products: ' + $json.aggregated_data.total_products + '
  • Live products: ' + $json.aggregated_data.live_products + '
  • Launched this week: ' + $json.aggregated_data.launched_this_week + '
  • Weekly revenue: $' + $json.aggregated_data.weekly_revenue_usd + '

Munger (Inversion)

' + JSON.stringify($json.retro_result.munger_analysis || {}).substring(0, 500) + '

Kahneman (Bias Check)

' + JSON.stringify($json.retro_result.kahneman_analysis || {}).substring(0, 500) + '

Taleb (Antifragility)

' + JSON.stringify($json.retro_result.taleb_analysis || {}).substring(0, 500) + '

Recommendations

' + JSON.stringify($json.retro_result.recommendations || [], null, 2).substring(0, 1000) + '
' }) }}

meta.description: Weekly retrospective: Monday 10 AM EST. Reads all project data, Stripe revenue, Plausible analytics. Retrospective Mind (Sonnet) analyzes through Munger/Kahneman/Taleb lenses. Writes learnings to Config tab. Emails weekly summary.
